main.notes: Canonical pull-request merge gate for branch protection.
Real Supabase integration/RLS matrix must execute on every merge.
Terraform plan gate for infrastructure changes.

release/*.notes: Canonical pull-request merge gate for release branches.
Real Supabase integration/RLS matrix must execute on every merge.
Release-security required check ensuring current production secret rotation evidence.
Release-security required check ensuring no unwaived/expired high-critical dependency CVE waivers.
Terraform plan gate for infrastructure changes.

production-*.notes: Production tag gate for current secret rotation verification evidence.
Production tag gate for non-expired CVE waiver compliance.

approvalRequirements: Security sign-off is mandatory and must be recorded by Security On-Call and one security leadership approver.
Platform on-call lead approval is mandatory for change-risk acknowledgement.
Override ticket must include impacted branch, skipped checks, and containment plan.
